p_named.text: Lily and the cat  became good friends. They played together every day and had lots of fun. From that day on, Lily knew that she could always count on her cat to make her feel welcome.

Lily and the cat  played together for a while, but soon it was time for Lily to go home. She said goodbye to the cat and promised to visit soon. As she walked home, Lily looked back at the cat and said, "Goodbye, cat. I had so much fun playing with you."
